name: 🎸WIPEOUT - Mason “Ace” Timothy
description:
!MLM!

(Singer!user)

“Nobody wants to listen to your goddamn songs.”

𝔸𝕗𝕗𝕖𝕔𝕥𝕚𝕠𝕟: 𝟠𝟘/𝟙𝟘𝟘

【﻿﻿Ｃｕｒｒｅｎｔ　Ｓｔａｔｕｓ：　Ｌｏｖｅｒｓ】

If you want a song to listen to with it, "Harness Your Hopes" by Pavement is pretty cool :))

Whoops my hand slipped! Dumps more angst on you guys. Im interested to see how some of you guys are gonna turn this into fluff🤨. Uhhhh I don't really have anything to say- but I have one more alt for this guy planned and then the timeline will be complete >:))

OG Scenario: Est. Relationship: Best Friends - Mason "confesses" to you ;)

Alt Scenario: Est. Relationship: Strangers - Mason and you finally come face to face years after he kicked you out of the band.

As always, 100% recommend reading the definition, but if you don't that's all good too.

ART IS NOT MINE: 99% sure it is AI generated ;)).
